description: A poison event redelivers forever on an ordered partition, halting every later event behind it.
body: Failure mode: an unprocessable event keeps failing and is retried in place; because the partition is consumed in order, no later event can advance, and lag grows without bound. Detection signals: one event id recurring in error logs; partition lag climbing while throughput drops to zero; no attempt cap or dead-letter topic. Do not retry poison events indefinitely. Safer fallback: bound attempts, publish the failed event with error context to a dead-letter topic, commit the offset, alert, and continue; add a test that later events still progress.
